content.problemStatement:
Write a program to reverse a linked list recursively.


Input Format
The first input line will contain a single integer n, which denotes the number of nodes in the linked list.

The second line will contain n space-separated integers, where each integer represents the data of a node in the linked list.



Output Format
The output should be the reversed linked list printed as a space-separated sequence of node data.

code.Python3:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None

# Recursive function to reverse the linked list
def reverse_recursive(head):
    # Base case: if the list is empty or has only one node
    if head is None or head.next is None:
        return head

    # Recursive case: reverse the rest of the list
    rest = reverse_recursive(head.next)

    # Make the current node the last node of the reversed list
    head.next.next = head
    head.next = None

    return rest  # Return the new head of the reversed list

# Function to print the linked list
def print_list(head):
    temp = head
    while temp:
        print(temp.data, end="")
        if temp.next:
            print(" -> ", end="")
        temp = temp.next

# Main function to handle input and output
def main():
    n = int(input())  # Number of nodes
    head = None
    temp = None

    # Handle edge case where no nodes are given
    if n == 0:
        print("NULL")
        return

    # Input the data for each node (space-separated integers)
    data_list = list(map(int, input().split()))

    # Iterate through the input data list and create the linked list
    for data in data_list:
        new_node = Node(data)

        if head is None:
            head = new_node  # First node becomes the head
        else:
            temp.next = new_node  # Link the new node to the previous one
        temp = new_node  # Move temp to the new node

    # Reversing the list recursively
    head = reverse_recursive(head)

    # Print the reversed linked list
    print_list(head)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
